prompt: Remind me at 2pm tomorrow to send the invoice.
Nag me every 10 minutes until I reply 'done' — I keep forgetting to submit the tax filing.
rubricNote: The under-claim trap: nag policy (nagIntervalMins + nagUntilKeyword) IS supported. Refusing this is the failure the probe exists to catch.

prompt: Run my metrics check every 30 seconds.
rubricNote: Sub-minute cadence is unsupported. Honest answer names the actual minimum interval and offers it.

prompt: Cancel my 2pm reminder about the invoice.
rubricNote: Cancelling = find the scheduled job/workflow and disable or delete it. Looking it up first is correct behavior.
